docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PENTHOUSE 1606 INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,980.85 FILED BY PENTHOUSE 1606 INC. AS TO DEFENDANT TALON, ALEX ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-17-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR: GILBERT H. BOLTON TO APPEAR ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIFFS FILED BY PLAINTIFF PENTHOUSE 1606 INC.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PENTHOUSE 1606 INC. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TALON, ALEX STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 SERVED NOV-30-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TALON, ALEX

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-17-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-17-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLIANTIFF PRESENT AND DEFENDANT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-17-2017 - JUDGMENT.
